name: @cap/raycast
description: Control Cap recording from Raycast via cap-desktop:// deep links.

raycast.title: Cap Recorder
raycast.description: Control Cap recording (start, stop, pause, resume, switch camera/microphone) without leaving the keyboard.
raycast.author: cap

commands.name: switch-microphone
commands.title: Switch Cap Microphone
commands.description: Switch the active Cap microphone by label.

commands.name: switch-camera
commands.title: Switch Cap Camera
commands.description: Switch the active Cap camera by model or device ID.

arguments.name: identifier
arguments.placeholder: Camera model or device ID (empty to clear)
